channel.title: Web Development on Tofan0810 Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Web Development on Tofan0810 Portfolio

item.title: Tofan Personal Website
item.description:
This site was generated using HUGO via Netlify. The theme that this site uses was forked from Eddie Webb and heavily modified to be more efficient as well as to fit my personal needs. Netlify acts as my CI. If I push out a change to the my-portfolio repo on GitHub then Netlify will automatically trigger and rebuild this website for production.

Theme Link: https://github.com/tofan0810/my-portfolio
